finding_results.notes: Updated every bowl-price recall to the canonical four-copper purchase and corrected the upsell arithmetic to six coppers so the two-copper dinner comparison still tracks.
Recast Aldric's post-separation report line to keep the clipped formal register without repeating the cross-chapter 'order that no longer existed' formula.
Aligned Chapter 16 with the continuity sheet and Chapter 1 by restoring the bowl's established four-copper origin price in all on-page references.

Added an immediate instability-surge beat before the ritual and an embodied skill-loss beat during separation so the extra length carries causality and consequence. Final chapter length verified at 4114 words.
